title.en: China-to-Guyana Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入圭亚那：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入圭亞那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Guyana GNBS standards and conformity context, GEA renewable-energy policy context, GPL grid interconnection and National Grid Code requirements, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility interface, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and Guyana's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid settings — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与圭亚那GNBS标准及合格评定背景、GEA可再生能源政策背景、GPL并网及国家电网规范要求、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据，以及圭亚那60 Hz / 120-240 V电网参数——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與圭亞那GNBS標準及合格評定背景、GEA再生能源政策背景、GPL併網及國家電網規範要求、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據，以及圭亞那60 Hz / 120-240 V電網參數——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GNBS conformity determination, GEA programme approval, GPL interconnection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Guyana National Bureau of Standards requirements, Guyana Energy Agency renewable-energy programme conditions, Guyana Power & Light interconnection requirements, project-owner specifications, and applicable IEC test editions with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GNBS合格评定裁定、GEA项目批准、GPL并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行圭亚那国家标准局要求、圭亚那能源署可再生能源项目条件、Guyana Power & Light并网要求、项目业主规格及适用IEC测试版本。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GNBS合格評定裁定、GEA項目批准、GPL併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行圭亞那國家標準局要求、圭亞那能源署再生能源項目條件、Guyana Power & Light併網要求、項目業主規格及適用IEC測試版本。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Guyana, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming the current GNBS standard, conformity, and product-inspection route for the inverter and any bundled electrical equipment; (2) obtaining IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence for the exact inverter model or family; (3) preparing IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence for GPL/GEA grid-tied review; (4) preparing IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC and harmonic evidence; and (5) reconfiguring and retesting firmware, protection, and anti-islanding settings for Guyana's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid, not China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V baseline. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is useful background but should not be treated as automatic GNBS, GEA, or GPL acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口圭亚那时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认逆变器及随附电气设备当前适用的GNBS标准、合格评定和产品检验路径；（2）取得覆盖特定型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（3）为GPL/GEA并网审查准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（4）准备IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列EMC和谐波证据；（5）针对圭亚那60 Hz / 120-240 V电网重新配置并重新测试固件、保护和防孤岛设置，而非沿用中国50 Hz / 220-380 V基准。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据可作为背景资料，但不应视为自动获得GNBS、GEA或GPL接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口圭亞那時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認逆變器及隨附電氣設備當前適用的GNBS標準、合格評定和產品檢驗路徑；（2）取得覆蓋特定型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（3）為GPL/GEA併網審查準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（4）準備IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列EMC和諧波證據；（5）針對圭亞那60 Hz / 120-240 V電網重新配置並重新測試韌體、保護和防孤島設置，而非沿用中國50 Hz / 220-380 V基準。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據可作為背景資料，但不應視為自動獲得GNBS、GEA或GPL接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
